XcmLiquidationNotifier","name":"","type":"address"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"stateMutability":"payable","type":"receive"}],"devdoc":{"details":"The relay-chain destination is SCALE-encoded as a VersionedLocation V5:   0x05 = VersionedXcm::V5   0x01 = 1 parent (relay chain)   0x00 = Here interior (0x050100 = V5 Location { parents: 1, interior: Here })","kind":"dev","methods":{"constructor":{"params":{"xcmNotifier_":"Address of the deployed XcmLiquidationNotifier contract."}},"notifyLiquidation(address,uint256,uint256,bytes32)":{"details":"Injects RELAY_DESTINATION and forwards to the 5-arg XcmLiquidationNotifier.","params":{"borrower":"The liquidated borrower's address.","collateralSeized":"The amount of collateral transferred to the liquidator.","correlationId":"A unique identifier linking this liquidation to its event trace.","debtRepaid":"The amount of debt repaid by the liquidator."}}},"stateVariables":{"RELAY_DESTINATION":{"details":"0x05 = V5 prefix, 0x01 = parents: 1, 0x00 = Here interior."}},"title":"XcmNotifierAdapter","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"RELAY_DESTINATION()":{"notice":"SCALE-encoded VersionedLocation V5 for the relay chain parent."},"notifyLiquidation(address,uint256,uint256,bytes32)":{"notice":"Called after a successful liquidation."},"xcmNotifier()":{"notice":"The XCM notifier this adapter forwards calls to."}},"notice":"Bridges the 3-arg ILiquidationNotifier interface expected by         LiquidationHookRegistry (and LendingEngine) to the 4-arg         XcmLiquidationNotifier.notifyLiquidation by injecting a hardcoded         relay-chain destination. The ABI mismatch between ILiquidationNotifier (address, uint256, uint256) and XcmLiquidationNotifier (bytes, address, uint256, uint256) caused silent hook failures in the v2-integration-test.  This adapter fixes that by acting as the registered hook handler in LiquidationHookRegistry while forwarding calls to the real XcmLiquidationNotifier with the correct 4-arg signature.","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"contracts/XcmNotifierAdapter.sol":"XcmNotifierAdapter"},"evmVersion":"cancun","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[":@openzeppelin/=node_modules/@openzeppelin/",":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/"]},"sources":{"contracts/XcmNotifierAdapter.sol":{"keccak256":"0xea34463b37313876e2104ec18c78cf400456ace944825194a3c68ae4f1285a63","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://e41f56b412fd0bbf3e201831234d231fbd8284f893719a44e5f08c86788bddbc","dweb:/ipfs/Qmc77mHtZ8nhSFTHWbqH1GXsLjemCLJHy36q6GHjcPNEzQ"]},"contracts/interfaces/ILiquidationNotifier.sol":{"keccak256":"0xa9bbdc984faa8b634b617dfc383d80f440ab59393debc0aa61e9af90ba5f2e0a","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://9a244995970380378e4db51e9da946f2196c6da33bdec52764f5dfd30806b68d","dweb:/ipfs/QmXAuCEQrGrdtYGUZxS5ZYG7D2p5idRo4s2Yyb6q8jNjP7"]},"contracts/precompiles/IXcm.sol":{"keccak256":"0xf4d50b7608a1e8fd14f5eeb8d19900acdfdf8893f87aea5c6c96e5a5776fa2ab","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://7280db1727eaab54342a57b9005e461c72e49bf1903d3fd954c0bf20e3aae60c","dweb:/ipfs/QmVbigk5yxjhCMYBFP6Z6Lrw6ipbBRiFLdWp5ZauFHSZXx"]},"contracts/precompiles/XcmLiquidationNotifier.sol":{"keccak256":"0xfe6152a46ff6863ac2f6825831bfd7dd66e4afbd4b1c815d531fa9660d8fde44","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://991651157d8cdc9e1824eca91816fd2c3c0cb6b9c4a5b5f112f4604a3682d5b0","dweb:/ipfs/QmYBdP1S8RY6UZ6rxk2PNsoYeK7p3PTPwwrB2h4PwWWTzt"]}},"version":1}

params.xcmNotifier_: Address of the deployed XcmLiquidationNotifier contract.

notifyLiquidation(address,uint256,uint25.details: Injects RELAY_DESTINATION and forwards to the 5-arg XcmLiquidationNotifier.

params.collateralSeized: The amount of collateral transferred to the liquidator.
params.correlationId: A unique identifier linking this liquidation to its event trace.
params.debtRepaid: The amount of debt repaid by the liquidator.

RELAY_DESTINATION().notice: SCALE-encoded VersionedLocation V5 for the relay chain parent.

xcmNotifier().notice: The XCM notifier this adapter forwards calls to.
